mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND r.date = STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND r.dept_sub_id = #{deptSubId} AND r.payment_status != 3 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_registration( patient_card_id, work_plan_id, doctor_schedule_id, doctor_id, dept_sub_id, date, slot, amount, out_trade_no, prepay_id, payment_status, create_time ) VALUES( #{patientCardId}, #{workPlanId}, #{doctorScheduleId}, #{doctorId}, #{deptSubId}, STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{slot}, #{amount}, #{outTradeNo}, #{prepayId}, #{paymentStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_registration SET payment_status = 4 WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} AND payment_status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT doctor_schedule_id AS doctorScheduleId, work_plan_id AS workPlanId FROM medical_registration WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}

SELECT id, out_trade_no AS outTradeNo, payment_status AS paymentStatus, DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, doctor_schedule_id AS doctorScheduleId, work_plan_id AS workPlanId FROM medical_registration WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id AS id, DATE_FORMAT(r.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, r.slot AS slot, s.name AS name, s.location AS location, d.job AS job, d.id AS doctorId, r.out_trade_no AS outTradeNo, r.prepay_id AS prepayId, r.transaction_id AS transactionId, r.payment_status AS paymentStatus FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON r.dept_sub_id = s.id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.date DESC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}

SELECT u.open_id AS openId, FORMAT(r.amount, 2) AS amount FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id JOIN patient_user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT r.id AS id, DATE_FORMAT(r.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, r.slot AS slot, c.name AS patientName, s.name AS subDeptName, d.name AS doctorName, d.id AS doctorId, s.location AS location, d.job AS job, r.out_trade_no AS outTradeNo, FORMAT(r.amount, 2) AS amount, r.payment_status AS paymentStatus, (SELECT dp.id FROM doctor_prescription dp WHERE dp.registration_id = r.id LIMIT 1) AS prescriptionId FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON r.dept_sub_id = s.id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT c.user_id AS userId, d.name AS doctorName, s.name AS subDeptName, r.id AS registrationId FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON r.patient_card_id = c.id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON r.dept_sub_id = s.id WHERE r.date = CURDATE() AND r.payment_status = 2
